actions.channelLocateConfigMissing: Managed-site admin config is unavailable. Filtered channels by URL for review.
actions.channelLocateFuzzyUrlOnly: Found only a fuzzy URL-level match. Filtered channels by URL for review.
actions.channelLocateInputPreparationFallback: Ranked matching inputs could not be prepared. Filtered channels by URL only.
actions.channelLocateKeyMatchedModelsDrifted: The same channel matched the key, but the model set only matched approximately. Filtered channels by URL for review.
actions.channelLocateKeyMatchOnly: Found a key match under the same URL bucket, but the model set did not match. Filtered channels by URL for review.
actions.channelLocateMultipleKeysFallback: Multiple keys found. Filtered channels by URL only.
actions.channelLocateNoKeyFallback: No API key is available for ranked matching. Filtered channels by URL only.
actions.channelLocateSecondaryExactModels: Found a secondary match by exact model set. Filtered channels by URL for review.
actions.channelLocateSecondaryModelsContained: Found a secondary match by model containment. Filtered channels by URL for review.
actions.channelLocateSecondaryModelsSimilar: Found a secondary match by model similarity. Filtered channels by URL for review.
actions.channelLocateSignalsConflict: Key and model checks pointed to different channel candidates. Filtered channels by URL for review.
actions.channelLocateUnresolved: No likely channel could be confirmed. Filtered channels by URL only.
actions.locateManagedSiteChannelUnsupported: These features are unavailable because Veloera does not currently support searching channels by URL.
actions.openAllExternalCheckInHint: Open unchecked external check-ins. Ctrl/Cmd: open all. Shift: open in new window. Ctrl/Cmd+Shift: open all in new window.
actions.scanDuplicatesHint: Scan accounts for duplicates (origin + upstream user id) and clean them up safely.

description: Manage all AI redistribution stations with one click

healthStatus.tempWindowDisabled: Protection bypass is disabled. Enable it in Settings > Data Refresh
healthStatus.tempWindowPermissionRequired: Protection bypass needs cookie interceptor permissions on Firefox. Grant them in Settings > Permissions
